history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
This image shows a screenshot of a WhatsApp chat conversation. The chat features various Star Wars-themed stickers, including characters like Yoda, Boba Fett, R2-D2, and BB-8, as well as Star Wars logos. The conversation itself appears to be in Indonesian, with messages like "iya knapa" (why?), "boti" (likely a typo or slang), "oo ia cewe" (oh yeah, girl), "nala" (a name), "napa" (why?), "mo lesbi?" (want to be lesbian?), "Kamu ce co" (you're a guy/girl?), and "Jangan bercandaa" (don't joke). The chat also shows contact information for "+62 852-4494-8286" with the name "~ ira" and mentions that the contact is not saved and that they are in a group. There are also options to "Blokir" (Block) and "Tambah" (Add) contact. The overall content is safe and does not contain any NSFW material.
